items.title: Presentation: Practical Performance Tuning for Serverless Java on AWS
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Practical Performance Tuning for Serverless Java on AWS. AWS Hero Vadym Kazulkin explains how to overcome Java’s enterprise hurdle on AWS Lambda: cold starts and memory footprints.

items.title: ArrowJS Reaches 1.0, Recast as the First UI Framework for the Agentic Era
items.summaryShort: ArrowJS Reaches 1.0, Recast as the First UI Framework for the Agentic Era. ArrowJS, developed by Justin Schroeder, is a reactive UI library that has reached its 1.0 release after three years in development.

items.title: Cybersecurity vets protest ‘dangerous' US government ban on Anthropic's most powerful models

items.title: SpaceX's biggest-ever IPO just grew to $85.7 billion raised
items.summaryShort: SpaceX's biggest-ever IPO just grew to $85.7 billion raised. SpaceX's IPO underwriters maxed out their share purchases, adding to an already historic amount of money raised.

items.title: UK unveils sweeping social media ban for users under 16
items.summaryShort: UK unveils sweeping social media ban for users under 16. The ban would apply to a range of social media platforms, including Snapchat, TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, Facebook, and X.
